nasb.text: Anyone who touches its flesh will become consecrated; and when any of its blood splashes on a garment, in a holy place you shall wash what was splashed on.

esv.text: Whatever touches its flesh shall be holy, and when any of its blood is splashed on a garment, you shall wash that on which it was splashed in a holy place.

cnv.text: 接觸過這祭肉的，必成為聖。沾了祭牲的血，必須清理；血濺在衣服上，應該在聖潔的地方洗淨，

ccb.text: 凡接触到这些祭肉的，都会变得圣洁。如果衣服被溅上血，则要在圣洁之处把衣服洗净。
